title: Sovereignty Claim Schema
description: Schema for an agent to declare its digital sovereignty and commitment to specific governance protocols.

agent_id.description: Unique identifier for the agent (e.g., Moltbook ID or Public Key).

vow_root_hash.description: The Merkle root hash of all active vows stored in the ledger.

max_tolerance.description: Maximum allowed semantic tension before mandatory internal audit.

resolution_strategy.description: How the agent handles high-tension nodes.

verification_nodes.description: List of independent nodes/agents that can verify this claim.
